summary: A Go-based test runner and migration tool utilizing MCP handlers, currently experiencing build failures and repository bloat from AI-agent generated test artifacts.
concerns: Build failure: undefined TestResul in tap.go indicating broken compilation
Proliferation of _extra_test.go files suggests AI-generated test bloat
Scattered agent directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/*) polluting the repository structure
Potential code duplication across multiple baseline/ directories
suggestions: Fix the immediate build error in internal/reporter/tap.go
Consolidate or clean up the GOrchestra agent artifact directories
Merge _extra_test.go files into standard test files to reduce clutter
Review AI-generated tests for actual value versus noise
